# POST /api/v1/notifications/schedule

**Schedule a future notification**

جدولة إشعار مستقبلي - API-NOTIF-002

Operation ID: `schedule`

**Authentication**

Required (Bearer Authentication).

## Request Body

Schema: `NotificationScheduleRequest` (application/json)

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description | Example |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| recipientId | integer (int64) | Yes |  | Recipient user ID (Security USERS_PK) - معرف المستخدم المستقبِل | 42 |
| channelHint | array<string> | Yes |  | Channel(s): single code, list, or "ALL" - القناة أو القنوات المطلوبة | ['EMAIL', 'PUSH'] |
| templateCode | string | Yes |  | Template natural code (NOTIF_TEMPLATE.TEMPLATE_CODE) - رمز القالب | USER_WELCOME |
| contextData | object | Yes |  | Placeholder substitution data for the template body - بيانات القالب |  |
| priority | string | Yes | pattern: `HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW` | Priority (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW) - لا يوجد عمود مخصص لتخزينها حالياً (Phase 1) | MEDIUM |
| moduleCode | string | Yes |  | Publishing module code (NOTIF_LOG.MODULE_CODE) - رمز الموديول الناشر | SECURITY |
| referenceId | integer (int64) | No |  | Polymorphic reference to the related business record - معرّف مرجعي (اختياري) |  |
| referenceType | string | No |  | Related entity type name from the publishing module - نوع الكيان المرجعي (اختياري) |  |
| scheduledAt | string (date-time) | Yes |  | Requested dispatch time (see DRV-NOTIF-004 — not yet durably honored) - وقت الإرسال المطلوب |  |

**Request Example**

_(partial — only fields with a documented example are shown)_

```json
{
  "recipientId": 42,
  "channelHint": "['EMAIL', 'PUSH']",
  "templateCode": "USER_WELCOME",
  "priority": "MEDIUM",
  "moduleCode": "SECURITY"
}
```

## Response `200` — OK

Shape: `NotificationSendConfirmation`

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| logEntryIds | array<integer> | No |  | One NOTIF_LOG id per fan-out channel - معرفات سجلات الإشعار |

## Other Possible Responses

Structurally guaranteed by this endpoint's own shape (auth requirement, permission check, request body) combined with the shared framework's exception handling — not specific business errors.

| HTTP Status | Code | Why |
|---|---|---|
| UNAUTHORIZED | UNAUTHORIZED | Endpoint requires authentication (global security requirement); GlobalExceptionHandler maps AuthenticationException to this status for every such endpoint. |
| BAD_REQUEST | INVALID_JSON | Endpoint accepts a JSON request body; GlobalExceptionHandler maps HttpMessageNotReadableException (malformed JSON) to this status for any @RequestBody, unconditionally. |
